name: io.github.askads/mcp-yandex-metrica
title: Yandex Metrica MCP
description: MCP server for Yandex Metrica API: list counters, goals and pull web-analytics statistics.

environmentVariables.name: YANDEX_METRIKA_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Yandex Metrica OAuth token (scope metrika:read) — read access to analytics data. Treat it as a secret.

environmentVariables.name: YANDEX_METRIKA_COUNTER_ID
environmentVariables.description: Default Metrica counter id, used when a tool call omits counterId.

environmentVariables.name: YANDEX_METRIKA_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: API root host. Override only for a proxy or a non-default endpoint.

environmentVariables.name: YANDEX_METRIKA_MAX_RETRIES
environmentVariables.description: Max retries for transient errors (429 rate limit, 5xx on reads).
